chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-953 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 24-03-2025 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant. M/s Farhan Ali and Ateeq-ur-Rehman, Advocates for respondent No.2. Ms. Shabana Naheed, APG. **** Counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press instant application and submits that the applicant will file Crl. Direct Complaint, to which counsel appearing on behalf of respondent No.2 as well as APG recorded no objection. Order accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
